title: Business inventories — shop, inventory view, and give item
changes: Business accounts now have their own inventory
New Inventory button: view all items currently held by a business
New Shop button: buy items from the server's economy store using the business balance; items go directly into the business inventory
New Give Item button: transfer items from a business inventory to any server member's personal inventory
Members receive a DM when a business gives them an item
Business shop purchases are logged to the business transaction history
